mapper.select:
select board_no, board_title, board_thumb, board_writer, to_char(board_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') as board_date, member_thumb from board_tbl join member_tbl on (board_writer = member_id) where board_status = #{status}
and board_category = 1
and board_category = 2
and board_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
and board_writer = #{searchKeyword}
order by board_no desc
order by board_no asc
offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
